allow: PowerShell($tools = "flutter","dart","git","winget","choco","java","adb","node"; foreach \($t in $tools\) { $c = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "{0} -> {1}" -f $t, $c.Source } else { "{0} -> NOT FOUND" -f $t } })
